iterations.theme: Faith, Love, and Marriage: Personal Journey and Practical Advice
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration encompasses the entire podcast, covering the speaker's personal journey, experiences, and comprehensive advice on relationships, faith, and marriage, concluding naturally at the end of her talk.
